data.title: Update CLAUDE.md to document shared merge-state library
data.description:
Add merge-state.sh to architecture description in review gate / test gate sections. Reference the library API (ms_ functions) and consumer list. Document _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR test injection mechanism.

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption #3 — static asset (Markdown documentation).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions merge-state.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'merge-state.sh' CLAUDE.md
